name: HC
description: HC is a place to play pickleball in Old Town Station, NY. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: New Dorp High School
description: Come play pickleball at New Dorp High School in Staten Island, NY! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to lights. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Staten Island Jewish Community Center
description: Staten Island Jewish Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Staten Island, NY. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
